name: Aeliana and the Forbidden Research: The Discovery of the Hybrid Potential
Draven's Floating Fortress
desc: The mobile, obsidian-clad seat of power for Warden Draven, hovering eternally above the Colosseum of the Sun.

name: Eileen The Ancient Guardian: The Sentinel of the Astral Fog
ELDRION: THE CHRONICLES OF THE THREE HOLY WARS
Jael's Hanging Canyons
desc: A gargantuan network of vertical, light-starved chasms carved into the dimension’s central basalt shelf, suspended over the absolute darkness of the Abyssal Breach.

name: Kaelen
desc: The Architect of Numbers and The Exiled God

name: Lucifuge
desc: The Lord of Fate and Architect of Ruin

name: Lysander The Martyr: The Architect of the Underground
Oakhaven Singularity
desc: A metaphysical anomaly where a fragment of the 1st Dimension’s ancient forest is being slowly consumed by a gravitational rift.

name: The 12 Thrones: The Geopolitics of Godhood
The 13 Dimensions: Architecture of the Observable Universe
The Absolute Zero Boundary: Physics of the Marginal Universe
The Abyssal Nexus Rupture: The Dissolution of Reality
The Aether Streams
desc: Luminous, river-like currents of liquid air and raw energy that flow predictably through the 8th Dimension’s high atmosphere, serving as the dimension's primary means of mass transit and ecosystem hydration.

name: The Aetheric Forges
desc: An industrial hellscape of divine light where the armor of angels and the chains of dimensions are forged.

name: The Aetheric Frequency Spectrum: From the Abyssal to the Higher Realm
The Aetheric Slipstreams
desc: Expansive, shimmering rivers of raw, liquid aetheric energy that flow vertically through the dimension’s high-altitude aurora, serving as the biological and energetic life-blood of the entire Eldrion system.

name: The Ash Weepers Cave
desc: A vast, subterranean network of moisture-rich caverns located beneath the Scorched Plateaus, serving as the only temperate biological refuge in the 7th Dimension.

name: The Ash Weepers Cult: The Religion of the Sanitized
The Ashborn Battery Ritual: The Engineering of Infinite Sorrow
The Ashen Tundra
desc: A vast, frozen wasteland of pulverized rock and "Memory-Ash" located on the northern pole of the 10th Dimension, where the temperature is permanently low enough to freeze time-itself.

name: The Ashen Wastes
desc: A vast, monochromatic desert of gray soot and petrified remains, located at the outermost edges of the 5th Dimension’s twilight influence.

name: The Atrophy of the 10 Races: The Industrial Decadence of Eldrion
The Awakening of the First Leviathan: The Breach of the Deep-Found Substrate
The Birth of the Hybrid King: The First Breath of the New World
The Bleeding Moors
desc: A vast, marshy plain of purple grass and red-tinted water, where the dimension’s "Emotional Waste" is said to collect and stagnate.

name: The Blood Swamps
desc: A vast, low-lying marshland of viscous red biological-runoff and pulsating muscle-fiber located at the base of the Throne of Skulls, serving as the dimension’s primary bio-chemical waste-drain.

name: The Boiling of the Silver Sea: The Thermodynamic Collapse of the 8th Dimension
The Boiling Sea
desc: A vast, planet-spanning ocean of super-heated water, fueled by the intense volcanic activity of the 3rd Dimension’s core.

name: The Bone Canyons
desc: A labyrinthine network of deep ravines carved into the fossilized remains of ancient, gargantuan creatures that once roamed the 4th Dimension.

name: The Bone Mines
desc: A gargantuan industrial excavation complex located in the dimension’s subterranean vaults, dedicated to the harvest of high-density calcified minerals from the remains of prehistoric organisms.

name: The Breach of the Veil: The Structural Fatigue of the Gate
The Canopy of Illusions
desc: The highest, most biologically dense layer of the 6th Dimension’s hanging jungles, where the concentration of prismatic spores creates a permanent state of organized, collective hallucination.

name: The Catacombs of the Resistance
desc: A gargantuan, multi-layered subterranean necropolis located beneath the ruins of the Silent City, serving as the primary hidden sanctuary and strategic command center for the Eldrion resistance movement.

name: The Celestial Nexus Ruins
desc: The gargantuan, shattered remnants of the universe’s original administrative and energetic hub, located at the "High-Horizon" of the 13th Dimension, predating the creation of the Divine Apex.

name: The Chained Peaks
desc: A range of gravity-defying, obsidian mountains that are physically anchored to the desert floor by colossal, mile-long iron chains.

name: The Chasm of Sighs
desc: A massive, vertical rift in the 5th Dimension’s central plain that emits a constant, melodic moan, which many believe to be the collective sorrow of the lost souls of Alaria.

name: The Chrono Wastes
desc: A vast, shifting desert of iridescent "Time-Silt" where the linear flow of time has been shattered into localized pockets of varying acceleration, stagnation, and regression.

name: The City of Dust
desc: A sprawling, skeletal ruin of a once-great metropolis that is in a state of permanent, accelerated entropy, where gravity and time combine to turn every structure into a fine, grey powder.

name: The City of Echoes
desc: A sprawling, twilight metropolis where the architecture itself resonates with the voices and memories of everyone who has ever walked its streets.

name: The Civil War of the Divine Apex: The Shattering of the Golden Order
The Clockwork Plague: The Oxidation-Crisis of the 2nd Dimension
The Cloud Mines
desc: A massive, multi-platform industrial complex suspended within the high-altitude nebulae of the 8th Dimension, dedicated to the extraction of concentrated aether-gas and raw gravity-crystals.

name: The Colosseum of the Sun
desc: A gargantuan, open-air arena carved from black obsidian, where the dimension's "Unrefined" are forced to fight for the entertainment of the elite.

name: The Coral Spires
desc: A vertically growing forest of mutated, heat-resistant coral that rises from the seafloor like a group of jagged, obsidian needles.

name: The Corruption of the Mana Streams: The Heart of the Grey
The Crater of Zephyr
desc: A gargantuan hemispherical impact site located at the "Low-Base" of the 6th Dimension, serving as the source of the realm’s permanent orbital winds.

name: The Craters of the Fallen
desc: A desolate, glass-scarred wasteland where the Divine Apex once rained down literal destruction during the Age of Purging.

name: The Crimson Canopy
desc: A vertically layered jungle of blood-leafed trees and parasitic vines that thrives on the atmospheric heat of the Iron Throne.

name: The Crimson Snow of Aethelgard: The Biological Inversion of the 9th Dimension
The Curse of the Twin Sirens: The Harmonic Severance of the 7th Dimension
The Dance of the Eclipse Moths: The Luminal Breakdown of the 4th Dimension
The Day of Two Shadows: The Causal-Alignment Failure of the 5th Dimension
The Demon Lords vs The Monarchs: The Clash of the High and the Hollow
The Deployment of the God Blight
The Drowned Citadel
desc: The submerged ruins of the dimension's original capital, a skeletal city of marble and gold resting in the crushing depths of the Boiling Sea.

name: The Dust Bowl
desc: A gargantuan, low-lying depression where the pulverized remains of the Scorched Plateaus accumulate, creating a sea of fine, abrasive dust that stretches to the horizon.

name: The Eclipse Nests
desc: A collection of parasitic, lightless dwellings located on the permanently shadowed underside of the dimension's largest floating continent, the "Sol-Breaker."

name: The Edge of Reality
desc: The absolute terminal boundary of the Eldrion system a shimmering, vertical wall of "Primal-Aether" that separates the orderly creation of the Divine Apex from the infinite, chaotic potential of the Primordial Void.

name: The Erosion_Cliffs
desc: The precarious, terminal boundary of the 10th Dimension, where the realm’s stable crust gives way to a miles-high precipice that is slowly but perpetually crumbling into the absolute void of the Astral Sea.

name: The Fall of the Floating City Zephyr: The Descent of the 4th Dimension’s Crown
The Falling City
desc: A gargantuan, inverted metropolis that is in a state of permanent, controlled descent through the dimension’s high-altitude clouds, kept aloft only by the desperate use of massive atmospheric-bellows and thermal vents.

name: The False Sun of the 4th Dimension: The Photonic Anomaly of Sector 4
The Famine Wastes
desc: A vast, featureless expanse of grey "Inert-Dust" located on the western horizon of the 12th Dimension, where the laws of thermodynamics have been altered to prevent any form of nutritional absorption.

name: The Final Synthesis: The Master Archive and the Long Song
The Flesh Pits
desc: A gargantuan network of vertical sinkholes and cavernous pits located in the dimension’s central volcanic rift, where the biological waste of the higher dimensions is "Stacked" and "Recycled."

name: The Flesh Stitcher's Keep
desc: A gargantuan, pulsating industrial fortress located in the dimension’s central volcanic rift, where the biological waste of the 11th Dimension is "Stitched" and "Refined" into new, more efficient forms for the Divine Apex.

name: The Floating Archipelago
desc: A surreal collection of suspended islands and jagged rock masses held in a precarious, high-altitude orbit by massive gravitational anchors and ancient aetheric-webs.

name: The Forbidden Vow: The Genesis of the Hybrid Lineage
The Forest of Doom
desc: A mutated, violet-hued jungle where the flora is more predatory than the fauna, growing at the edge of the Warden’s industrial reach.

name: The Fractal Labyrinth
desc: A non-Euclidean maze of crystalline shifting walls where the architecture repeats itself infinitely at ever-smaller scales, serving as the dimension's primary psychological containment facility.

name: The Gardens of Null
desc: A silent, frozen botanical garden where life has been replaced by eternal, crystalline perfection.

name: The Gates of Ash
desc: A gargantuan, crumbling gateway of black-basalt and iron located at the dimensional intersection of the 11th and 12th Dimensions, serving as the primary point of entry for the "Discarded-Data" of the universe.

name: The Genesis of the Seraphim: The Engineering of the White Fire
The Geyser Fields
desc: A sprawling volcanic plain on the seafloor characterized by thousands of active geysers that spew super-heated water and minerals into the Boiling Sea.

name: The Ghoul Run Tunnels
desc: A network of abandoned, lightless subterranean tunnels and maintenance ducts located beneath the catacombs of the 11th Dimension, serving as a transit for biological waste and feral "Experimental-Failures."

name: The Glass Desert
desc: A vast, shimmering expanse where the sand has been fused into razor-sharp crystalline shards by the unceasing heat of the eternal sun.

name: The Golden Blockade
desc: A massive, orbital ring of fortifications and gates that controls all travel between the Divine Apex and the 11 Splintered Dimensions.

name: The Grand Chronology of the 13 Dimensions: A Meta-Historical Synthesis
The Grand Treason: The Zenithos-Abyssos Pact
The Graveyard of Stars
desc: A gargantuan, light-starved expanse of absolute zero located at the dimension’s "Far-Horizon," where the extinguished and "Spent" energy-cores of every dimension are physically discarded.

name: The Great Bellows
desc: A gargantuan complex of brass cylinders and massive pistons that regulates the oxygen and pressure of the 2nd Dimension.

name: The Great Mana Drought: The Dessication of the 8th Dimension
The Grotesque Hordes: The Biological Entropy of the Abyssal Flesh
The Hallucinogenic Jungles
desc: A vertically-inclined jungle of translucent, bioluminescent flora located in the high-pressure canopy layer of the 6th Dimension, where spores and prismatic mists blur the line between reality and phantom.

name: The Ignition Craters
desc: A geological and industrial complex of massive geothermic pits located at the "Core-Rift" of the 7th Dimension, where the realm’s internal magma is harvested for the Divine Apex.

name: The Incursion of the First Dimension: The Graying of the Light
The Inverted_Mountains
desc: A gargantuan range of jagged, basalt-and-iron mountains that hang from the dimension’s "Atmospheric-Plate," pointing vertically down into the absolute darkness of the Abyssal Breach.

name: The Iron Throne Capital
desc: A sprawling, soot-choked industrial metropolis that serves as the seat of local power in the 1st Dimension.

name: The Labyrinth of Mirrors
desc: A shifting, non-Euclidean maze of silver-glass and dark-matter located in the "Refractive Belt" of the 5th Dimension, where reality is as thin as a reflection.

name: The Last Oasis
desc: A precarious, heavily-guarded sanctuary of water and shade located in the geographic center of the Dust Bowl, representing the only permanent water source in the 7th Dimension.

name: The Leviathan's Graveyard
desc: A vast, silt-covered valley on the seafloor littered with the gargantuan skeletons of the dimension’s original, massive predators.

name: The Leyline Nexus
desc: A geographically unstable convergence point of the dimension’s magical arteries, where raw power bleeds into reality.

name: The Light Weaver's Guild
desc: A gargantuan industrial fortress and research complex where the dimension’s primary export solidified light is physically woven into textiles, armor, and structural components for the Divine Apex.

name: The Lost Fleet of the Void: The Deep-Found Expedition
The Madness of Oracle Vane: The Information Singularity of the Void Kin
The Mana Field: Theory and Mechanics
The Mana Harvests: The Economic Engine of the Dark Age
The Marrow Wastes
desc: A vast, blinding-white desert of pulverized bone-ash and ancient skeletal debris located on the dimension’s eastern horizon, serving as the final resting place for the dimension’s biological waste.

name: The Massacre at Obsidian Pass: The Fall of the 7th Gate
The Midnight Market
desc: A subterranean bazaar of secrets, memories, and forbidden artifacts, hidden within the labyrinthine under-cities of the 5th Dimension.

name: The Mirror Lakes
desc: Expansive, perfectly still basins of liquid silver-aether that reflect the dimension’s light and the subconscious projections of those who gaze into them.

name: The Molten Veins
desc: A subterranean network of glowing, geothermal conduits that transport the molten lifeforce of the dimension to the industrial hubs.

name: The Monolith of Gales
desc: A single, gargantuan pillar of polished obsidian that rises from the depths of the Crater of Zephyr, piercing the dimension’s high-altitude clouds and serving as the primary anchor for the eternal winds.

name: The Obsidian Quarry
desc: A massive, geometric excavation site located on the edge of the Glass Desert, where the dimension’s dense, volcanic obsidian is harvested for the Divine Apex.

name: The Origin Moment: Before the First Architect Arrived
The Panopticon Spire
desc: An impossibly tall, lens-festooned needle that monitors the thoughts and actions of every living soul in the 11 Dimensions.

name: The Petrified Forest
desc: A gargantuan expanse of prehistoric arboreal structures where time has been artificially brought to a total halt, turning all organic matter into seamless, indestructible stone.

name: The Piston City
desc: The mechanical heart of the 2nd Dimension, a city-sized machine built upon massive, synchronized gears and churning pistons.

name: The Platinum Throne
desc: Gabriel’s seat of absolute power, suspended in a frictionless vacuum.

name: The Pressure Domes
desc: A network of artificially lit, high-strength transparent spheres that house the 3rd Dimension’s remaining civilian population and industrial hubs.

name: The Prismatic Spire
desc: A gargantuan, multi-faceted crystalline tower that serves as the administrative and energetic focal point for the 9th Dimension, focusing raw aetheric light into refined prismatic frequencies.

name: The Psychological Labyrinths
desc: A non-Euclidean network of shifting basalt tunnels and mirror-finished chambers that project the suppressed fears, traumas, and shames of those who enter, serving as the dimension's primary psychological containment facility.

name: The Purge of the 10th Race: The Sanitization of the mortal Worlds
The Pyrian Cinder Slums
desc: A sprawling, chaotic urban sprawl of scrap metal and petrified ash, located on the precarious edge of the Ignition Craters.

name: The Radiant Bastion
desc: The primary military stronghold of the Angelic Host, a fortress of impenetrable light.

name: The Red Oasis
desc: A rare, lush valley in the center of the Glass Desert where the water runs the color of iron and blood, feeding a garden of crimson vegetation.

name: The Resonance Caves
desc: A subterranean network of vast crystalline chambers located beneath the Fractal Labyrinth, where the stone itself vibrates in harmony with the dimension’s aetheric light-currents.

name: The Resurrection of the Bone Dragon: The Necrotic Overflow of Dimension 6
The Rise of Seraphic Fanaticism: The Birth of the Blind Light
The River of Sorrows
desc: A slow-moving, mile-wide river of viscous, grey aetheric-sludge that winds through the central valley of the 11th Dimension, acting as the dimension’s primary waste-disposal and emotional-drainage system.

name: The Rotting_Core
desc: A gargantuan, pulsating biological power-source located at the absolute geometric center of the 12th Dimension, currently in a state of terminal, viral decay and entropic collapse.

name: The Ruins of Alaria
desc: The skeletal remains of a once-great civilization, now a labyrinth of shattered marble and lingering psychic echoes.

name: The Rust Wind Valleys
desc: A series of deep, red-stained canyons where the atmosphere is hyper-saturated with corrosive iron-oxide, causing the rapid disintegration of both biological and metallic matter.

name: The Rusting Slums
desc: A massive, vertical labyrinth of scavenged metal and decaying infrastructure that serves as the primary dwelling for the 2nd Dimension’s surplus labor.

name: The Scorched Plateaus
desc: An elevated expanse of cracked basalt and obsidian, subjected to the most intense and direct solar radiation in the 7th Dimension.

name: The Scrap Peaks
desc: To the east of the Slums lie the Scrap Peaks mountains made entirely of compressed, rusting industrial waste and discarded prototypes.

name: The Sea of Glass
desc: A vast, frozen expanse of translucent obsidian and crystal that reflects the truth of all who walk upon it.

name: The Seal of the Silent King: The Forging of the Abyssal Nexus
The Seraphic Crusade: The Systematic Harvesting of the Future
The Shadowed Keep
desc: The floating, indigo-black fortress of Warden Noctis, serving as the primary seat of power and the central observation point for the 5th Dimension.

name: The Shattered Glass Wastes
desc: A vast, dangerous desert of pulverized multi-colored glass and razor-sharp crystalline shards, created during the catastrophic collapse of the dimension's original orbital mirrors.

name: The Siege of the Divine Apex (2nd War): The Fall of the Upper Spire
The Siege of the Eternal Forge
The Silence of the Bio_Synths: The Neural Collapse of the Synthetic Race
The Silence of the Titans: The Thermodynamic Trap of the Architects
The Silent_City
desc: A gargantuan, light-starved metropolis of white-marble and bone-ceramic located at the geographic center of the 11th Dimension, where sound is strictly forbidden and the inhabitants live in a state of perfectly preserved stillness.

name: The Silent_Trench
desc: The absolute lowest and most pressurized point of the 12th Dimension a miles-deep vertical fissure where all light, sound, and kinetic movement are physically suppressed by the dimension’s central gravity-well.

name: The Slag Wastes
desc: A vast, shimmering desert of industrial byproducts, cooling metal, and rivers of molten slag that surround the central industrial hubs.

name: The Slaughter of the Lunar Wolves: The Sanitization of the 13th Dimension’s Peaks
The Slaying of the Fallen Monarchs: The Deicide of the Silver-Wings
The Solar Flare Ridge
desc: A jagged, glass-fused mountain range on the northern edge of the dimension, acting as the primary terrestrial focal point for the sun’s periodic electromagnetic discharges.

name: The Soul Core: Biology of the Aetheric Self
The Spear of Silence: The Nexus Betrayal
The Static Wastes
desc: A vast, iron-sand desert at the base of the Thunderhead Peaks, where the air is so heavily ionized that it creates visible, constant arcs of electricity between the dunes.

name: The Stormward Bastion
desc: A massive, multi-tiered fortress of obsidian and white-marble built on the edge of the Void Tear, serving as the primary research and military containment facility for the dimension's entropic anomalies.

name: The Sub-Level Slums
desc: A light-starved, subterranean urban sprawl located at the geometric base of the Prismatic Spire, housing the dimension’s "Refracted" the outcasts and laborers deemed too messy for the surface.

name: The Throne of Skulls
desc: A gargantuan mountain range composed entirely of trillions of fossilized humanoid and non-humanoid skulls, serving as the terrifying administrative and religious heart of the 12th Dimension.

name: The Thunderhead Peaks
desc: A range of jagged, copper-veined mountains located in the "High-Static Zone," permanently engulfed in a massive, planet-scale electrical storm.

name: The Treaty of Iron: The Partition of a Broken World
The Trench of Whispers
desc: An abyssal canyon at the center of the Boiling Sea where acoustic distortions create permanent "Memories of Sound."

name: The Underground Railroad of Souls: The Clandestine Logistics of Survival
The Vanishing of the 9th Legion: The Causal-Static Disappearance
The Viral Jungles
desc: A dense, light-starved overgrowth of hyper-mutated biological constructs and aggressive, viral vegetation located in the dimension’s southern tropical volcanic vents.

name: The Vocation of Purity Lineage: The Spiritual Guardians of the Bloom
The Void Kraken's Wake
desc: A miles-wide path of absolute spatial destruction and shattered crystalline reefs left by the passage of a gargantuan, extra-dimensional predator known as the "Void Kraken."

name: The Void Tear
desc: A localized, vertical collapse of reality where the barrier between the 8th Dimension and the 12th (The Abyss) has been permanently breached, creating an entropic pull that threatens to consume the surrounding archipelago.

name: The Weeping of Lithos: The Gravity-Grid Collapse of Oakhaven
The Weeping_Glade
desc: A rare, protected valley located in a "Wind-Shadow" of the Thunderhead Peaks, where the dimension’s moisture is trapped, creating a sanctuary of perpetual rain and lush, mourning vegetation.

name: The Whispering Steppes
desc: An infinite expanse of silver-white grass that resonates with the residual memories of the millions who have perished in the Splintered Dimensions.

name: The White Room
desc: An infinite expanse of sensory erasure where the "impure" are processed.

name: Torin The Archivist: The Meta-Custodian of Truth
Warden Kael of the 11th: The Ethics of Skimming
Zenithos
desc: The Grand Usurper and Leader of the Monarchs
